title: Cosmological Cutting Rules from Flat-Space Unitarity via Dressing
author_string: Arhum Ansari, Sachin Jain, Deep Mazumdar
abstract: Using cosmological dressing rules, we uplift flat-space unitarity cuts to discontinuity relations for dS/EAdS observables. In this representation, Cutkosky delta functions map directly to "Disc" operations in the exchanged energy variable. This provides a transparent diagram by diagram origin of cosmological cutting rules. We illustrate this with explicit examples at tree level and one loop for conformally coupled scalars.
